name: Conseil
description: Conseil, rendered in lush watercolor washes, possesses a face of quiet intelligence and unwavering loyalty. His skin is a warm, almost olive, tone, softly blending with the pale blues and greens of the ocean hues surrounding him. His features are sharp but gentle: a straight, slender nose, high cheekbones subtly blushed with rose madder, and a strong jawline softened by the roundness of his chin. His eyes, the focal point of his expression, are a deep, contemplative brown, flecked with amber and often shadowed with a touch of indigo, hinting at both wisdom and weariness. He is clean-shaven, revealing a well-defined mouth, often drawn in a slight, almost imperceptible smile. Conseil's practical attire consists of a simple, buttoned-down shirt of undyed linen, rendered in creamy beige and pale grey. A practical, dark blue vest, perhaps wool, covers his torso, offering a stark contrast to the lightness of his shirt. His trousers are a muted brown, almost the color of wet sand, and are tucked into sturdy, leather boots, rendered in shades of umber and burnt sienna. A wide-brimmed hat, woven from straw and shaded with a faded ochre, protects him from the sun, casting a permanent shadow across his brow, and completing his look of dependable and pragmatic seafarer.
